channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Hampstead Lane A519, 25th June
item.description:
Plane trees overhang beds within this garden area, would it be possible to lift/reduce these limbs at an appropriate time in the season to allow more light
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Hampstead Lane, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rear of 56, 25th June
item.description:
Resident called to raise concerns with overgrown grass. Which has now grown the the hight of the residents kitchen window. The resident expressed that rubbish is now being thrown into this heap of grass and is an invitation for rats and other rodents. Please can this be looked into and resident contacted. Janet Hobson Flat 56 Webheath Netherwood Street London NW6 2JR 07931171197
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Netherwood Street, Kilburn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Malvern Place, 25th June
item.description:
Street sweeping not done

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Place, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish outside empty house, 25th June
item.description:
This rubbish, which is not only unsightly but must be environmentally unfriendly has been outside this empty house for months.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rutland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More fly tripping!!’, 25th June
item.description:
General waste. Pls install CCTV As ongoing problem

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hollydale Road, Nunhead, Greater London

item.title: Flytipped rubbish, 25th June
item.description:

item.title: No lights over the railway footbridge, 25th June
item.description:
No lights over the railway footbridge where Peareswood Road meets Slade Green Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peareswood Road, North End, Greater London

item.category: Light in park or open space

item.title: Road drain is blocked, 25th June
item.description:
Corner of Walnut Tree Road and Stonewood Road continues to flood across Stonewood Road EVERY TIME it rains and has done since I arrived here 9 years ago.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walnut Tree Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Needle in wood chip border of carpark, 25th June
item.description:
Junkie needle in wood chip border of car park opposite aldi. Needs to be removed as a danger to the public especially children!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): London Road, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Concerns with my neighbours will say ongoing issue's they have a hugh Tree which I believe needs to be protected she is beautiful and old and unsure whether she is protected, 25th June
item.description:
Beautiful old tree, unsure whether protected but need to be before construction starts and they decide to cull her, my prospective over hanging branches
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Kenley Close, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Raised paving stone, 25th June
item.description:
Pavement trip hazard outside Hilton

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Catherine Grove, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped on pathway, 25th June
item.description:
Rubbish collection was today but looks like the neighbour a few doors down put her bags where you can see in the photo We have a problem with rats and her or her visitors keep dumping rubbish ain’t gonna help

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victorian Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged keep left/right signs, 25th June
item.description:
Damaged keep left/right signs due to car incident.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwich High Road, Greenwich

item.title: Long grass., 25th June
item.description:
The grass needs cutting round the trees and edges as people leaving food and bottles in the long grass as not been cut since last year ,
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 109, Tillingbourne Green, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London

item.title: Graffiti sprayed on Lambeth charity clothes container at St John's Crescent SW9, Brixton road., 25th June
item.description:
I like to report graffiti sprayed on a charity clothes container at St John's Crescent SW9 on Brixton main road. The container is terracotta in colour it now has more graffiti sprayed on it since I last reported it. Please can the graffiti be removed. It has been there for approximately two months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St John's Crescent, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green waste fire risk, 25th June
item.description:
5 Portbury Close have chopped down a tree and dumped it by the roundabout beside Carnicot House

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Portbury Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
